summary:
Enhanced AI chat agent architecture with 4-layer context management, intent detection pipeline, tool orchestration, context switching via TaskFrame stack, and plan for an interactive vanilla HTML/CSS/JS demonstration.

Covers:
- Enhanced L1–L4 context layers with eviction/compaction policies
- Intent classification taxonomy (7 intent types)
- TaskFrame stack-based context switching with suspend/resume semantics
- Tool registry, selection, chaining, and error recovery
- Entity extraction and cross-frame linking
- Interactive demo specification with mock conversation scenario
